mapper.select: SELECT component_product_id, component_qty FROM om_product_set_component WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order, component_product_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO om_product_set_component (product_id, component_product_id, component_qty, sort_order) VALUES
(#{productId}, #{c.componentProductId}, #{c.componentQty}, 0)

INSERT INTO om_product_set_component (product_id, component_product_id, component_qty, sort_order) VALUES
(#{row.productId}, #{row.componentProductId}, COALESCE(#{row.componentQty}, 1), 0)

INSERT INTO om_product_set_component (product_id, component_product_id, component_qty, sort_order) VALUES
(#{row.productId}, #{row.componentProductId}, COALESCE(#{row.componentQty}, 1), 0)
ON CONFLICT (product_id, component_product_id) DO NOTHING
